CredentialMode.description: Where the target's durable credential lives on the Form host.
CredentialMode.title: CredentialMode

Transport.description: How Form reaches a target to deploy the agent.
Transport.title: Transport

description:
A durable access credential, summarized for management (no secret material).

Derived from registered targets: managed keys are grouped by their logical
transport + ``user@host:port`` identity, so IDs remain stable if Form's
configuration root moves. ``target_ids`` lists every target that shares it.

exists.description: whether the key/cert file is present on the Form host
exists.title: Exists

fingerprint.description: SHA256 fingerprint of the public key, when resolvable
fingerprint.title: Fingerprint

key_path.description: server-side path of the key/cert on the Form host
key_path.title: Key Path

title: CredentialInfo
